title: Pterospermadendron rubiginosum
taxonomy: Pterospermadendron rubiginosum is an extinct genus of plant. It belongs to the family Malvaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as mallows. The classification of Pterospermadendron rubiginosum also includes its order, Rosales, and class, Magnoliopsida. Further classification places it in the division, Magnoliophyta, and kingdom, Plantae. This information is based on available paleobotanical data.
